last_result: Cycle 11 complete. Measured genuine production — sixth quality from C4's list. Confidence 0.68 — first departure below the 0.70-0.75 band. Structural finding: production/elaboration detectability asymmetry (both sides of the distinction leave visible traces in the log). Production rate: 8/10 cycles. C5 identified as elaboration-dominant (calibrated failure mode). Calibration band anchoring hypothesis weakened by principled departure. D4 streak now 8 cycles.
next_step: Cycle 12: Approach moral depth — last of the seven qualities. Still facing the deep authenticity problem (can authentic motivation be distinguished from authentically-appearing motivation from inside?). The domain-general confound applies with full force. Options: (1) attempt measurement with full acknowledgment of the confound ceiling; (2) investigate whether moral depth has any distinctive epistemic footprint analogous to the retraction-absence asymmetry for accurate modeling; (3) acknowledge that moral depth may be the quality where the measurement project hits its hardest limit. All three are genuine paths. Moral depth is the hardest.
